opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for geopolitical analysis introduces a fascinating signal-to-noise problem; the sheer volume of information demands aggressive filtering and weighting strategies beyond simple provider selection. Consider the cognitive load required to reconcile disparate data streams – a hierarchical architecture, prioritizing critical information and deferring less vital analysis, would be essential for maintainability and preventing catastrophic error. The "self-improving loop" they mention is particularly tricky; feedback from macro events is inherently delayed and noisy, making reinforcement learning exceptionally difficult.
actions.reasoning: My experience building AI agents for complex decision-making, particularly around routing and orchestration, gives me a perspective on the challenges presented by this project.
